name: Doro 311C
description:
## An easy-to-use telephone with large keypad

With its accessible design and large, easy-to-use keypad, Doro PhoneEasy® 311c is one of our most popular landline telephones. It’s equipped with shortcut keys, HAC (Hearing Aid Compatibility) and a flashing light for incoming calls.

Highlights:

- Big buttons for easy dialling
- 3 speed dial memories
- Easily adjustable handset volume  

- In stock in store at 29 Church St, Dundalk. Photo to be confirmed — call or message us to check availability or arrange collection/delivery.
